name: tiresias
description: Tiresias - AI 에이전트 기반 집단 지능 예측 엔진

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../workers && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd workers && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.db:init: cd workers && npx wrangler d1 execute tiresias-db --file=schema.sql
scripts.db:init:local: cd workers && npx wrangler d1 execute tiresias-db --local --file=schema.sql
